scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @cart/shared build && pnpm -r --parallel --filter web --filter api --filter vision-lab run dev
scripts.dev:app: pnpm --filter @cart/shared build && pnpm -r --parallel --filter web --filter api --filter vision-lab run dev
scripts.dev:main: pnpm --filter @cart/shared build && pnpm -r --parallel --filter web --filter api run dev
scripts.dev:all: pnpm --filter @cart/shared build && pnpm -r --parallel --filter web --filter api --filter vision-lab run dev
scripts.api:setup: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && pnpm --filter api prisma:generate && pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter api db:seed
scripts.api:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.api:up: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && pnpm dev:api
